chart_type: grayscale 3-shape scatter (filled disk / gray square / open diamond)
method: §2b grayscale-shape classifier: (1) detect 24°C disks via gray<50 + 4×4 erode + CC; (2) subtract disks from wider gray<200 mask (no fit-curve subtraction needed here); (3) CC classify by density (>0.55 + area>30 → square; 0.15-0.5 + area 12-90 → diamond); (4) dedup diamonds against disks/squares within 5px.
